---
title: "Creating a personal website with Quarto"
description: |
  Notes of my own process
date: 2023-12-30
author: 
  - name: Adriano Belisario
categories: [Quarto,Github]
open-graph: false
draft: false
---

<!--------------- set up ----------------->

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: 'hide'

long_slug <- "quarto-website"

# NOTE: after finishing post, run renv::snapshot() and copy the renv.lock file 
# from the project root into the post directory
# renv::use(lockfile = "renv.lock")
```

<!--------------- post content ----------------->

https://quarto-dev.marioangst.com/en/blog/posts/multi-language-quarto/
